name: apex-pm-saa
description: Strategic Asset Allocation PM plugin. Runs 16 portfolio construction methods, ensemble CIO analysis, risk management, and rebalancing monitoring on top of analysis-assetclass outputs.

commands.name: construct
commands.description: Run portfolio construction methods (one or all 16)

commands.name: risk
commands.description: Run risk analysis and stress tests on portfolio construction outputs

commands.name: recommend
commands.description: Run CIO ensemble analysis and produce final portfolio recommendation

commands.name: rebalance
commands.description: Monitor rebalancing needs against a live portfolio

commands.name: run
commands.description: Run the full SAA pipeline: construct → risk → recommend
